title: pteris milneana
intro: Pteris milneana, also known as the Australian fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. Consuming Pteris milneana has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Pteris milneana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
